message.content:
(1) PASS — Suivi pédagogique view has Notes/Absences tabs and a notes table with coefficients.  
(2) PASS — Note modal is titled 'Saisir une note' with student/matière/note fields.  
(3) PASS — Alertes IA view has a table with risk badges (Élevé/Moyen/Faible) and 'Traiter' buttons.  
(4) PASS — Alerte modal is titled 'Traiter l'alerte IA' with status select + commentaire.  
(5) PASS — Étudiants view has a table with matricule, color-coded moyenne, and assiduité bar.  
(6) PASS — Rapports view lists AI-generated reports with Export PDF buttons.
